element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Foundational mechanic for all subsequent levels
Prison colony architecture requires climbing to access objectives
Required for navigating Fiorina 161 prison layout
Confined spaces restrict movement and visibility
Variant enemy type; increased threat variety
Standard weapon; baseline damage and rate of fire
Explosive option for tactical combat scenarios
Awareness tool; warns of enemy proximity in containable areas
Structural element; unlocks mission objectives and layout blueprints
Navigation aid; reveals spatial structure and secret areas
Containment-based mission type; environmental puzzle solving
Alternative mission type; adds escort/protection challenge
Systemic pressure; failure on expiration creates tension throughout
Climactic encounter; represents ultimate threat and narrative conclusion

typical_relief_triggers: Locating safe room or terminal area
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Escalating pressure: Early levels establish mechanics with moderate threat; mid-game introduces objective variety and enemy combinations; time limits create persistent underlying tension that intensifies as deadline approaches; climax features Alien Queen encounter

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Blueprints from computer terminals reveal alternate routes and secret areas; non-critical prisoner locations create exploration incentive
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Prison layout blueprints accessible only via computer terminals; suggest hidden paths and room interconnections

difficulty_curve.early_game: Tutorial-like introduction of core mechanics (jumping, shooting, climbing, doors, elevators) with manageable enemy frequency; motion tracker and blueprints available as guidance aids
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Objective complexity increases (door sealing, prisoner rescue); enemy variety expands (Facehuggers introduce new threat); time limits become more pressing; vertical design and confined tunnels increase navigation difficulty
difficulty_curve.late_game: Multi-objective missions combining sealing and rescue; sustained enemy pressure; tight time windows; culminates in Alien Queen final boss battle
notable_spikes: Introduction of Facehugger enemies (new attack patterns)
Final Queen encounter (boss pattern learning required)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each level contains computer terminals where player selects mission type (door sealing or prisoner rescue) and accesses prison blueprints; converts linear progression into choice-driven structure within fixed map
Fiorina 161 prison colony emphasizes multi-level design with ladders, elevators, and crawl tunnels; vertical movement is as critical as horizontal; allows multiple solutions to reach objectives
Door sealing objectives require navigating enemy-populated areas to reach bulkheads; player must manage combat while moving toward objective, with time pressure increasing urgency
Prisoner rescue missions add secondary objective of protecting or retrieving NPCs; increases complexity by adding navigation constraint and potential casualty failure state
Culminating Alien Queen battle serves as narrative and mechanical peak; represents solo threat distinct from mook enemy types; requires mastering weapon switching and damage patterns
